title: clausena javanica
intro: Clausena javanica, also known as Java citron or Javanese pepper, is a small evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine and possesses various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clausena javanica include its ability to aid in digestion, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Clausena javanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
